chunks.content:
Article: Who threw the spear
[]: Who threw the spear? Post by Razeil100 » Mon Dec 08, 2008 3:13 am In EoE when Asuka is fighting the Eva series She annouces that the one she is just about to kill is the last one, seconds before a fake LoL gets her through the head. This is a minute BEFORE the units regenerate. Who the fuck threw it? :(

[]: Post by V » Mon Dec 08, 2008 4:09 am i figured this out a while ago it was Eva Unit-08 you see the production art for the individual battle damage each one receives, actually gives the Unit numbers for each of these, Unit-08 is the one that gets its leg cut off at the knee now ask yourself: is getting a volley of 10 missile-spikes hot through your head at point blank range, a fight-ending move? probably. Being completely cut in half? Probably. Having your upper jaw sheered off of your body and the blood wrung out of your torso like a damp rag? again, probably. ***but simply cutting off Unit 08's leg at the knee, would not be a fight ending move....even for Unit-02. Unit-02 has specifically survived even this very same damage (in episode 10 ) or of other limbs, and still emerged victorious the answer is simply that Asuka was hurrying with barely over 3 minuts to defeat 9 Mass Production Evas, and she simply "briefly incapacitated" one before moving to the next; as you will recall, after cutting 08's shin off, she got tackled by another MP Eva, and had to shoot it off with her missile-spike launcher. So she got a little distracted, and didnt' finish him off. Further, 08 is the only one that we don't actually see "regenerating" later (turning back on again), and whoever threw the Spear was STILL "on"

[]: Post by Reichu » Mon Dec 08, 2008 6:23 am V wrote: i figured this out a while ago it was Eva Unit-08
